description: The TailwindTraders development team needs a centralized artifact feed to manage dependencies and prevent build failures due to public registry timeouts. Create a new Artifact Feed named 'Tailwind-Universal' in the 'TailwindTraders' project. The feed must include upstream sources for both NuGet Gallery and npmjs. Configure the feed with project-level visibility and a retention policy that limits the maximum number of versions per package to 15.
